name: Casanova
overview: Exiled from his beloved Venice, Giacomo Casanova flees to Paris at the dawn of the Enlightenment in hopes of putting his reputation as a playboy behind him. But old habits die hard, and temptation is everywhere as Casanova finds a wealth of new opportunity... and trouble.  Part of Amazon's fall 2015 pilot season.  Currently only the pilot has been made.

trailers.title: CASANOVA Season 1 TRAILER (2015) Amazon Studios Series
